User Story (short): Backend: REST gateway, validation, consistent error shape
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): REBUILT on NestJS+TypeScript (locked stack). Modular: /modules/{auth,student,attendance,activities} with controller/service/repository/policy pattern. Global: Helmet headers; HTTPS enforce; CORS; JSON-only; class-validator DTO pipes (whitelist+forbidNonWhitelisted); GlobalExceptionFilter → {code,message,details?} for 400-500; RequestId interceptor; LoggingInterceptor; ThrottlerGuard (X-RateLimit headers); AuthGuard (@Public bypass); AuthorizationGuard; AuditService. Health: GET /health. Auth: POST /v1/auth/mpin/verify|lockout/status|forgot-mpin with DTO validation → service stubs. OpenAPI/Swagger at /api/docs. Zero TS build errors.

User Story (short): Student: enter 6-digit MPIN, get token/session
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): POST /v1/auth/mpin/verify: bcrypt MPIN hash verification via AuthRepository (in-memory store with seeded test student; DB in Task 2.1). On success: JWT issued (sub=studentId, 1h expiry, issuer=mindforge-backend) via @nestjs/jwt; session recorded. On failure: 401 INVALID_CREDENTIALS (generic msg — no identity leak). Lockout: AuthPolicy enforces 5 attempts → 15 min lockout (403 ACCOUNT_LOCKED with lockedUntil). Rate limit: @Throttle 10 req/60s on mpin/verify. Audit: LOGIN_SUCCESS/LOGIN_FAILURE/LOGIN_BLOCKED_LOCKOUT via AuditService (requestId+IP+studentId). No MPIN in logs or response. lockout/status endpoint returns live lockout state.

Task Title: Lockout status and Forgot MPIN entry points
User Story (short): Student: see lockout status and Forgot MPIN path
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): POST /v1/auth/lockout/status: fully implemented — returns isLocked, lockedUntil, attemptsRemaining, maxAttempts (5), lockoutDurationMinutes (15). Unknown studentId returns generic not-locked (no identity leak). DTO validates studentId as UUID; 400 on invalid. POST /v1/auth/forgot-mpin: returns 202 Accepted with documented message — v1 entry point only; full OTP flow deferred. Audit: FORGOT_MPIN_INITIATED logged. Error shape consistent: {code,message,details?} on all error paths.

Task Title: Auth middleware and Bearer token validation
User Story (short): Backend: validate Bearer on protected routes
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): AuthGuard now verifies JWT via JwtService.verifyAsync with ConfigService secret. Expired token → 401 TOKEN_EXPIRED; invalid/wrong-secret → 401 INVALID_TOKEN; missing header → 401 UNAUTHORIZED. On success: extracts sub/studentId/class/board from JWT payload and attaches to request.student. @Student() param decorator for clean controller access. @Public() routes bypass guard. AuthModule @Global() exports JwtModule for guard DI. GET /v1/student/me added as protected endpoint demo — returns authenticated student context. No cross-student access: business layer scoped to request.student.id.

User Story (short): System: versioned schema for students, activities, etc.
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): TypeORM + PostgreSQL (prod) / better-sqlite3 (dev). 11 entities: students, syllabus_metadata, teaching_feed, activities, questions, responses, attendance, doubt_threads, doubt_messages, sessions, audit_log. Indexes: student_id, activity_id, date (attendance), syllabus composite (class+board+subject+chapter). Versioned migration: InitialSchema20260211001 with up/down (idempotent). DatabaseModule configures TypeORM via ConfigService; synchronize in dev, migrations in prod. All per Architecture §5.1.

User Story (short): Business layer: repositories for all entities
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): 10 repositories: StudentRepo, SyllabusRepo, TeachingFeedRepo, ActivityRepo, QuestionRepo, ResponseRepo, AttendanceRepo, DoubtRepo, SessionRepo, AuditLogRepo. BaseRepository with withErrorHandling(): transient DB errors (deadlock, connection) → retry 3x with exponential backoff; unique constraint → 409 ConflictException; all queries parameterized via TypeORM. All queries scoped by student_id. AuthRepository migrated to TypeORM (students+sessions from DB, lockout in-memory until Redis). AuditService now persists to audit_log table.

Task Title: Business layer skeleton and dependency injection
User Story (short): API layer: business logic calls data access only
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Business services: StudentService (today's plan, profile, sync status), ActivitiesService (get activity, submit answer, pause, results), GradingService (deterministic MCQ/TF/fill-blank; AI stub for open-ended), AttendanceService (summary+calendar), DoubtService (threads, messages, AI stub). Domain exceptions: InvalidMpinException, AccountLockedException, ActivityNotFoundException, ActivityAlreadyCompletedException, QuestionNotFoundException, DoubtThreadNotFoundException, StudentNotFoundException, AiUnavailableException — all mapped to HTTP codes. API→Service→Repo layering enforced.

User Story (short): Student: get today's tasks and progress summary
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): GET /v1/student/today: returns student context (id, displayName, class, board) + task cards (id, type, title, syllabusRef{subject,chapter,topic}, questionCount, estimatedMinutes, status, score) + completedToday/totalToday/progressPercent. Auth required; scoped by student_id via @Student() decorator. Empty state: empty tasks array with 0 progress. GET /v1/student/profile: returns profile + totalActivitiesCompleted. DevSeederService seeds 3 activities + 5 questions + 10 attendance records in dev. Coding standards applied: no TODOs, explicit edge cases, domain exceptions only.

User Story (short): Student: open activity, see questions, pause/save progress
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): GET /v1/student/activities/:type/:id: returns activity metadata + questions (id, type, content, options, difficulty, sortOrder, answered). Correct answers never exposed. PENDING→IN_PROGRESS on first access. Types: homework, quiz, test, gap_bridge. 404 if not found or not assigned. POST /v1/student/activities/:type/:id/pause: saves progress, marks PAUSED. No-op if already completed. Auth required; scoped by student_id.

User Story (short): Student: submit answer, get correct/incorrect (deterministic grading)
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): POST /v1/student/activities/:type/:id/respond: accepts {questionId, answer, requestFeedbackLevel?}. DTO validation: UUID for questionId, non-empty answer, optional FeedbackLevel enum. Deterministic grading for MCQ/TRUE_FALSE/FILL_BLANK (case-insensitive compare). Returns {questionId, isCorrect, score, feedback, feedbackLevel, isComplete, nextQuestionId}. Idempotent: duplicate submit returns existing result. Auto-completes activity when all questions answered (updates status+score). 409 if activity already completed. 404 for unknown activity/question.

User Story (short): Student: get activity result (score, breakdown, suggested next)
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): GET /v1/student/results/:type/:id: returns activityId, type, title, status, totalQuestions, answeredQuestions, correctAnswers, score (0-100), per-question breakdown [{questionId, isCorrect, score}], suggestedNext [{type, title, reason}]. Suggested next based on performance: <60%→gap_bridge, 60-89%→quiz, 90%+→next topic. Auth required; scoped by student_id. 404 if not found.

User Story (short): Business layer: call AI with timeout and fallback
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): AiProviderService: OpenAI-compatible HTTP client using native fetch+AbortController. 10s timeout → deterministic fallback. Response validated (sanitized, no raw errors). Token usage logged (model, tier, tokens, latency). FallbackConfig per call site. PromptBuilderService: typed prompt builders for grading, feedback, doubt — all use syllabus context only (no PII, pseudonymous). Cost tiering: grading=cheap model, feedback=higher model. Config: AI_BASE_URL, AI_API_KEY, AI_GRADING_MODEL, AI_FEEDBACK_MODEL, AI_TIMEOUT_MS, AI_MAX_TOKENS, AI_TEMPERATURE. AiModule @Global.

User Story (short): Student: next AI guidance level (Hint → Approach → Concept → Solution)
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): GET /v1/student/activities/:type/:id/feedback?questionId=&level=. FeedbackService enforces level order: Hint→Approach→Concept→Solution. Auto-advances if no level specified. No skipping (resolveTargetLevel ensures monotonic progression). Returns {questionId, level, content, fromAi, nextLevel, maxLevelReached}. Persists feedbackLevel+aiFeedback+aiConversationRef to response entity. Fallback: static syllabus-aware hints when AI unavailable. 404 for unknown activity/question.

User Story (short): System: deterministic for objective; AI/rubric for open-ended
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): GradingService: MCQ/TRUE_FALSE/FILL_BLANK → deterministic (case-insensitive exact match, score 0/100). SHORT_ANSWER/LONG_ANSWER → AI-assisted via AiProviderService with rubric context; parseGradingResponse extracts JSON {isCorrect, score, feedback}; score clamped 0-100. No API key → graceful 'pending' status. ActivitiesService.submitAnswer now delegates to GradingService. AI grading results stored: aiFeedback+aiConversationRef in response entity. No PII in prompts.

User Story (short): Student: attendance summary and calendar for period
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): GET /v1/student/attendance: AttendanceController with AttendanceQueryDto — period shortcuts (this_month, last_month, this_term) or explicit startDate/endDate. Returns {summary: {studentId, period, totalDays, present, absent, late, attendancePercent}, calendar: [{date, status}]}. Default: this_month. Timezone-safe date formatting (no UTC shift). Auth required; scoped by student_id. Validation: enum for period, regex for YYYY-MM-DD. Empty state: 0 counts + empty calendar.

Task Title: Doubts: GET list GET thread POST message with syllabus context
User Story (short): Student: doubt threads with Class→Subject→Chapter→Topic context
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): DoubtsController: GET /v1/student/doubts (list threads), GET /v1/student/doubts/:threadId (thread + messages), POST /v1/student/doubts (new thread or reply with syllabus context). DTO: CreateDoubtDto with message, optional threadId, syllabusClass/Subject/Chapter/Topic. Replies inherit thread's syllabus context. AI responses via AiProviderService with syllabus-aligned prompt (fallback on AI failure). GET /v1/student/syllabus/tree: SyllabusController+SyllabusService — returns Class→Subject→Chapter→Topic hierarchy from flat records. Both new modules registered.

User Story (short): Student: profile and sync status (conflict hint)
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Enhanced profile: GET /v1/student/profile now returns progressOverview [{type, total, completed, averageScore}] via ActivityRepository.getProgressOverviewForStudent (GROUP BY type, AVG score). GET /v1/student/sync/status: returns {lastSyncAt, hasConflict, conflictHint?}. Stub — real sync tracking deferred to Sprint 7. Auth required; scoped by student_id.

Task Title: Client app shell and API client (auth REST error shape)
User Story (short): Client: Bearer token, error shape, retry
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): React+TS+Vite scaffolded in /client. API client (src/api/client.ts): base URL, Bearer auth, JSON parse, {code,message,details?} error shape, AbortController timeout (15s), 2x retry on network errors, offline detection. AuthContext: login/logout, sessionStorage token persistence. Vite proxy /v1→localhost:3000. Design tokens (theme.css): sage green, deep brown, cream per UX. BottomNav + Skeleton components. Zero TS errors; 80KB gzipped.

User Story (short): Student: 6-digit MPIN, keypad, error/lockout states
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Route /login. 6-digit MPIN dots + on-screen keypad. Auto-submit on 6th digit. States: default, entering, loading (spinner), error (red border + message + attempts remaining), locked (countdown timer). Forgot MPIN link. Accessibility: aria-label on keypad, role=alert for errors. Navigate to /home on success.

User Story (short): Student: task cards, progress bar, completed today
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Route /home. Greeting (time-based), student name. Progress bar (percent + X of Y). Task cards: type badge, status badge, title, subject, question count, estimated time, score. States: loading (skeleton), default, empty (All caught up!), error (Try Again). Tap card → /activity/:type/:id or /results/:type/:id. BottomNav: Home, Attendance, Doubts, Profile.

Task Title: Activity screen (Screen 3) — question answer AI feedback panel
User Story (short): Student: question, submit answer, AI feedback or fallback
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Route /activity/:type/:id. Question flow: progress bar, MCQ options or text input, Check Answer. Submitting → correct (green) or incorrect (red + AI feedback panel). Feedback panel: Get a Hint → More Help (progressive levels). AI thinking indicator. Pause/exit saves progress. Auto-advances to next unanswered question. Complete state → View Results. Accessibility: question labelled, progress aria-label.

User Story (short): Student: score, breakdown, suggested next
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Route /results/:type/:id. Score circle (gradient), star rating (1-5), per-question breakdown (✓/✗ with scores), Suggested Next cards (type + title + reason), Back to Home. States: loading (skeleton), success, perfect score celebration (🎉). 256KB JS bundle.

User Story (short): Student: attendance summary and calendar
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Route /attendance. Period selector (This Month/Last Month/This Term). Summary card: Present, Absent, Late, Rate. Calendar grid (7-col, day numbers in coloured dots). Legend. States: loading (skeleton), default, empty, error (retry). Uses GET /v1/student/attendance?period=. Timezone-safe date formatting. Fully responsive 480px max-width.

Task Title: Doubts screen (Screen 6) with syllabus context selector
User Story (short): Student: AI chat with Class→Subject→Chapter→Topic context
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Route /doubts. Thread list + chat view. Syllabus context bar (Subject·Chapter·Topic) with Change picker (cascading dropdowns from GET /v1/student/syllabus/tree). Chat: student/AI bubbles, auto-scroll, thinking indicator, Enter-to-send. Ask a Doubt creates new thread; replies inherit context. States: loading, empty, error. SendIcon SVG.

User Story (short): Student: profile (name, class, board, progress) and logout
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Route /profile. Avatar initial, name, Class/Board chips, school. Progress Overview: per-type mini progress bar (completed/total + avg score). Quick Links to Attendance and Doubts. Logout with confirmation dialog. Uses GET /v1/student/profile. Clears sessionStorage on logout → /login.

User Story (short): Student: sync status; conflict Use latest? / Keep current
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): SyncBanner component on HomeScreen. Polls GET /v1/student/sync/status every 60s. Green dot + 'All caught up!' when synced. Orange dot + conflict modal on hasConflict=true: 'Found newer progress on another device' with [Keep Current] [Use Latest] actions. Overlay with stopPropagation. Fully typed SyncStatus interface.

Task Title: Teacher upload API and file storage integration
User Story (short): Teacher: upload PDF/notes via API with file validation
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): TeacherContentController: POST /v1/teacher/materials/upload (multipart) + GET /v1/teacher/materials + POST /:id/retry. File validation (PDF/DOCX/TXT 20MB MIME+ext). Local storage in dev. teacher_materials entity+repo. X-Teacher-Id header. Audit logging.

User Story (short): System: parse PDFs/docs into text and split into semantic chunks
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): TeacherContentService.processAsync: pdf-parse v1 for PDF extraction. Text cleaning (headers/footers/page numbers). Semantic chunking ~500 tokens with ~50 token overlap preserving paragraph boundaries. teacher_material_chunks entity. Async non-blocking. Failure → status=failed.

User Story (short): System: generate vector embeddings for chunks; store in pgvector
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): Embedding via OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (configurable). Batch 20 chunks/call. JSON text in SQLite dev (pgvector for prod). EmbeddingsRepository with cosine similarity search in-memory. On failure: status=failed. HNSW/IVFFlat index path for PostgreSQL.

User Story (short): Activities: search teacher material by semantic similarity
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): RetrievalService: embeds student question via same model. Vector similarity search scoped by class/subject. Top-K=5 configurable. Confidence threshold=0.7 configurable. Below threshold → empty → 'Not found in provided material.' 10s timeout.

User Story (short): Activities: build retrieval-augmented prompts; call AI with strict grounding
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): AiOrchestratorService: system prompt enforcing retrieval-only answering + [chunk:{id}] citation. Retrieved chunks as sole context. Temperature 0.15. On timeout/error: fail closed → 'Not found in provided material.' Conversation history (last 6 msgs).

User Story (short): System: validate AI responses for citations and on-topic alignment
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): ResponseValidatorService: regex [chunk:{uuid}] citation extraction. Validates cited IDs in retrieved set. Rejects no-citation responses. Heuristic off-topic markers ('based on my training' etc). Returns validated response + cited_chunk_ids or fail closed.

User Story (short): System: log AI usage (tokens, latency, retrieval stats); monitor cost/quality
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): ai_usage_logs entity: student_id feature_type model tokens latency retrieval_stats response_status rejection_reason. AiUsageRepository aggregations. AiUsageLoggerService non-blocking wrapper. All AI calls (doubt pipeline) log usage.

Task Title: Security: file validation and access control and audit
User Story (short): System: strict file validation; access control for material retrieval; audit
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): File validation: MIME+extension whitelist 20MB. X-Teacher-Id access control. Student retrieval scoped by class at repo level. No raw material to students. Audit log upload/retry. Rate limiting via ThrottlerGuard. Multipart through JsonOnlyMiddleware.

Task Title: DevOps: storage bucket and embedding worker and deployment and monitoring
User Story (short): Team: cloud storage; async embedding worker; CI/CD; monitoring
Tracker Notes (Dev Agent): TEACHER_STORAGE_PATH EMBEDDING_MODEL RETRIEVAL_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD RETRIEVAL_TOP_K env vars. Async in-process worker. NestJS build clean. New entities auto-migrate dev. CORS X-Teacher-Id. Production: S3/GCS storage pgvector embedding worker documented.
